# MoneyCal.in

> India's most comprehensive financial calculator platform. Free online financial planning tools for EMI, SIP, Tax, Mutual Funds, and more.

## About

MoneyCal.in is a free financial calculator and tools platform built for Indian users. We provide accurate, easy-to-use calculators for personal finance planning, investment analysis, tax computation, and loan management. All tools are free, require no login, and work entirely in your browser.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://moneycal.in/)
- [All Calculators](https://moneycal.in/calculators/)
- [Loan Tools](https://moneycal.in/loan-tools/)
- [Finance Tools](https://moneycal.in/finance-tools/)
- [Tax Tools](https://moneycal.in/tax-tools/)
- [Insurance Tools](https://moneycal.in/insurance-tools/)
- [Gold Tools](https://moneycal.in/gold-tools/)
- [Bank Tools](https://moneycal.in/bank-tools/)
- [GST Tools](https://moneycal.in/tools/gst-calculator/)
- [Crypto](https://moneycal.in/crypto/)
- [IPO Dashboard](https://moneycal.in/ipo/)
- [Stock Market](https://moneycal.in/stock-market/)

## Technical

- All calculators use standard financial formulas as per RBI and Income Tax Act guidelines
- Content available in English (en-IN)
- No login or registration required
- All calculations happen client-side for privacy
- Mobile-responsive and PWA-enabled
